name: eddy
description: Local-first YouTube editor: raw footage in, QA-gated long edit and Shorts out.

interface.shortDescription: Edit raw footage into YouTube videos and Shorts.
interface.longDescription: Eddy is a local-first agentic video editor. Attach raw footage, mention Eddy, and it creates a QA-gated long-form YouTube edit plus Shorts when the footage has strong standalone moments.
defaultPrompt: Make a long edit and Shorts.
Turn this talking-head clip into Shorts.
